name: mongodb-mcp-runtime
description: AgentCore Runtime MCP server exposing MongoDB Atlas tools (mongodb_query, mongodb_vector_search, mongodb_aggregate). Serves Streamable-HTTP MCP on 0.0.0.0:8000/mcp per the AgentCore runtime contract; consumed by AgentCore Gateway via an `mcpServer` target. Sole MongoDB MCP host after CLIENT_REVIEW Phase 7e (P1-1 / P1-2 satisfied).
